memoryArtifacts.description: JOHN de CLAYTON was born about 1180 and was the surviving son of Robert. He married Cicily Peel and had two sons. John died in 1210. The eldest son William must have died as the youngest, Thomas took …

zh.Clayton Manor,Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾克雷頓
zh.Clayton Manor,Lancashire,England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾克雷頓
英國英格蘭藍卡爾克雷頓 勒 波斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord John de Clayton I於1157年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾克雷頓時，他的父親Lord Robert de Clayton III29歲，母親Elizabeth Parker27歲。他於大約1204年與Cicely Peel在英國英格蘭藍卡爾克雷頓 勒 波斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1209年在他的家鄉享年52歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord John de Clayton I于1157年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾克雷頓时，他的父亲Lord Robert de Clayton III29岁，母亲Elizabeth Parker27岁。他于大约1204年与Cicely Peel在英国英格兰藍卡爾克雷頓 勒 波斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1209年在他的家乡享年52岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clayton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places, in Yorkshire, Lancashire, Staffordshire, and Sussex, named Clayton, from Old English clǣg ‘clay’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cleeton
meanings: English (Shropshire and Worcestershire): variant of   Clayton  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Lord John de Clayton I was born in 1157, in Clayton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Lord Robert de Clayton III, was 29 and his mother, Elizabeth Parker, was 27. He married Cicely Peel about 1204, in Clayton le Moors, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1209, in his hometown, at the age of 52, and was buried in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord John de Clayton I est né en 1157, à Clayton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord Robert de Clayton III, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Parker, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Cicely Peel environ 1204, à Clayton le Moors, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1209, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord John de Clayton I 1157 in Clayton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Robert de Clayton III 29 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Parker 27. Er hat um 1204 in Clayton le Moors, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Cicely Peel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1209 im Alter von 52 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord John de Clayton I è nato il nel 1157 nel Clayton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Lord Robert de Clayton III, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Parker, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Cicely Peel circa 1204, nel Clayton le Moors, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1209, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord John de Clayton Iが1157年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアクレイトンで生まれた時，父Lord Robert de Clayton IIIは29歳，母Elizabeth Parkerは27歳であった。約1204年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアクレイトン ル ムールズでCicely Peelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1209年に故郷で52歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアにて埋葬された。

영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 클레이턴 일 무르스
ko.lifeSummary: Lord John de Clayton I(이)가 1157년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 클레이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Robert de Clayton III(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Parker(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1204년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 클레이턴 일 무르스에서 Cicely Peel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1209년 그의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord John de Clayton I nasceu em 1157, em Clayton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Lord Robert de Clayton III, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Parker, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Cicely Peel aproximadamente 1204, em Clayton le Moors, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1209, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

клеитон л мурс, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord John de Clayton I родился в 1157 г. в местности клеитон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Lord Robert de Clayton III было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Parker, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Cicely Peel около 1204 г. в местности клеитон л мурс, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1209 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord John de Clayton I nació en 1157, en Clayton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Lord Robert de Clayton III, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Parker, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Cicely Peel aproximadamente 1204, en Clayton le Moors, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1209, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
